nodes.label: AI as summarization tool for long technical documents
nodes.label_negative: Manual reading and extraction of key points

nodes.label: AI as editor for improving written output
nodes.grounding_span: use AI to run these through to check for ways in which they might be improved

nodes.label: AI reliability for factual retrieval
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability for specific factual information
nodes.grounding_span: I've found AI to be less reliable in these instances

nodes.label: AI as foundational work assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over core analytical and writing skills
nodes.grounding_span: AI can have a role in doing some of the foundational work leaving me to do the more interesting side

nodes.label: AI embeddedness and user choice
nodes.grounding_span: having the option to disable tools for certain activities is important

nodes.label: Accuracy and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: make sure that they're an accurate reflection of the source

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: It has to still sound like it's in my 'voice'

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm mindful of not wanting to hand that over

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for summarization and editing
nodes.grounding_span: The satisfied ways I use it are the ones I've described to you

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for factual retrieval
nodes.grounding_span: More frustrating is when I used AI to try and find out a specific piece of information

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI in product development
nodes.grounding_span: I hope it will... improving some of our product development processes

nodes.label: Preference for choice in AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: having the option to disable tools for certain activities is important

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through selective feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I'll give it a first go, review the proposals and may come back saying - drop that one, have another go at that section

nodes.label: Domain-based task allocation with personal boundaries
nodes.grounding_span: I've never used AI to help with emails or with writing performance review content
